highlights.title: DeepSeek Unveils Flagship AI Model a Year After Breakthrough
highlights.description: DeepSeek rolled out preview versions of a new flagship artificial intelligence model a year after upending Silicon Valley, calling it the most powerful open-source platform in a challenge to rivals from OpenAI to Anthropic PBC.

highlights.title: China’s Carmakers Grab 30% of Europe’s Plug-In Hybrid Sales
highlights.description: Chinese automakers made strong inroads into Europe last month as consumers rushed to buy more affordable plug-in hybrids from brands led by BYD Co.

highlights.title: Lightelligence Is Said Set to Price HK IPO at Top of Range
highlights.description: Chinese optical-computing company Lightelligence is poised to price its oversubscribed Hong Kong initial public offering at the top of the marketed range, according to people familiar with the matter, signaling hot demand for components used in the artificial-intelligence buildout.

highlights.title: TSMC Shares Surge as Taiwan Lifts Single-Stock Limit for Funds
highlights.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. shares climbed to a record after Taiwan’s financial regulator eased limits on single-stock fund holdings, a move that JPMorgan Chase & Co. said could draw more than $6 billion of inflows.

highlights.title: Bitcoin-holder Metaplanet raises $50 million to buy more BTC
highlights.description: Metaplanet has issued 8 billion yen, or about $50 million, in zero-interest bonds to fund additional bitcoin purchases.

highlights.title: Cohere to acquire German AI company Aleph Alpha as it looks to expand in Europe
highlights.description: Schwarz Group — a key backer of Aleph Alpha — plans to invest $600 million in Cohere's upcoming Series E round as part of the deal.

highlights.title: TSMC shares jump to record high as Taiwan eases single-stock investment caps for funds
highlights.description: TSMC, whose shares had a hit a record high on Thursday as well, last week reported a 58% increase in first-quarter profit.

highlights.title: Bob Iger rejoins Thrive Capital as advisor after Disney exit
highlights.description: The former Disney CEO hold a stake in Thrive, and has previously held the role of the venture partner at the firm.

highlights.title: People will be 'living and working' on the moon in the 2030s, says space tech CEO
highlights.description: A lunar base will be operating on the moon by the end of the 2020s, according to Dylan Taylor, who said humans will be living there in the next decade.

highlights.title: Alibaba’s Qwen AI is coming to cars, allowing drivers to order food and book hotels by voice
highlights.description: Alibaba is rolling out its Qwen AI across multiple car brands, promising hands-free features like ordering meals and managing deliveries from the driver’s seat.

ai.title: This is the Google Health logo that might replace the Fitbit app
ai.description:
Over the weekend, we reported on the Fitbit Air and Google Health. We now have our first look at the Google Health brand.
more…

chips_cloud.title: China’s Carmakers Grab 30% of Europe’s Plug-In Hybrid Sales
chips_cloud.description: Chinese automakers made strong inroads into Europe last month as consumers rushed to buy more affordable plug-in hybrids from brands led by BYD Co.

chips_cloud.title: TSMC Shares Surge as Taiwan Lifts Single-Stock Limit for Funds
chips_cloud.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. shares climbed to a record after Taiwan’s financial regulator eased limits on single-stock fund holdings, a move that JPMorgan Chase & Co. said could draw more than $6 billion of inflows.

chips_cloud.title: Norway Set to Become Latest Country to Ban Social Media for Under 16s
chips_cloud.description: Norway plans to restrict access to social media for children under 16, joining a growing number of countries responding to concerns about the potential harm kids face online.

chips_cloud.title: Philippines Looks to Follow Australia's Social Media Ban
chips_cloud.description: Philippine Senator Win Gatchalian discusses his push to enact social media policies similar to those in Australia, in an effort to protect minors from excessive use and mental health harm. He speaks with Shery Ahn on “Bloomberg Tech: Asia.” (Source: Bloomberg)

ev_autonomous.title: Bob Iger rejoins Thrive Capital as advisor after Disney exit
ev_autonomous.description: The former Disney CEO hold a stake in Thrive, and has previously held the role of the venture partner at the firm.

ev_autonomous.title: Interview: we talk home batteries with Franklin WH CEO Gary Lam
ev_autonomous.description:
On today’s charged up episode of Quick Charge, we’ve got Franklin WH co-founder and CEO Gary Lam here to talk us through some of the benefits of a home battery system, and what it takes to make the most of one – with, or even without a home solar panel system.
more…

crypto.title: Wisconsin joins prediction market fight, suing Kalshi, Coinbase, Polymarket, Robinhood and Crypto.com
crypto.description: The state's complaint highlights language used by prediction market platforms as language for gambling, not investing.
